    decorate(title) {

            const { infos, warnings, errors } = this.problemManager.getProblemStat();
            const markerCount = infos + warnings + errors;
            return markerCount > 0 ? [{ badge: markerCount }] : [];
        }
        else {
            return [];
        }
    }
    get onDidChangeDecorations() {
        return this.emitter.event;
